name: Ethoca (Mastercard) Chargeback Prevention API
what_it_does: Mastercard-owned chargeback prevention platform with API — enabling merchants to share transaction details with card issuers via Mastercard's Consumer Clarity (formerly Ethoca) network to resolve disputes before chargebacks are filed, providing enhanced transaction descriptors to prevent confusion-based disputes, and reducing chargeback ratios for ecommerce merchants.
use_cases: Sharing enhanced transaction details via Ethoca network to prevent confusion chargebacks
Responding to issuer inquiries with merchant transaction data before chargeback filing
Querying dispute prevention analytics for Mastercard transaction portfolio
Integrating Consumer Clarity descriptor data for improved transaction recognition
Monitoring pre-dispute resolution rates for payment operations dashboards
not_for: Visa chargeback prevention (use Verifi for Visa-specific network)
Post-chargeback representment and disputes (use Chargebacks911 for fighting disputes)
Real-time transaction fraud scoring (use Kount or Riskified)
best_when: A merchant with significant Mastercard transaction volume wants to prevent chargebacks before filing by sharing clear transaction context with issuers via Mastercard's Consumer Clarity network.
avoid_when: Your volume is primarily Visa (use Verifi for Visa), you need post-dispute representment, or you're below chargeback threshold where prevention ROI is unclear.

auth.notes: API key from Ethoca merchant account. Bearer token auth. Merchant-scoped access. Webhook for Consumer Clarity inquiries requiring merchant response. PCI DSS compliance required. Acquired by Mastercard (2019). Access through Mastercard Engage partner program. Consumer Clarity data sharing via Mastercard's issuer network.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction and subscription pricing; contact sales
pricing.notes: Canadian company (Toronto). Founded 2005. Acquired by Mastercard (2019). Now part of Mastercard's Dispute Resolution solutions as 'Consumer Clarity.' Largest chargeback prevention network for Mastercard. Covers 4,000+ issuers globally. Collaborative data sharing model — merchant provides transaction details to resolve confusion before dispute. Works alongside Verifi (Visa) for complete network coverage.

performance.rate_limits: Per merchant volume limits per Mastercard contract

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for Consumer Clarity inquiry response and network data sharing. Bearer token auth. Documentation through Mastercard developer portal. Real-time responses to issuer inquiries are time-sensitive. Mastercard acquiring bank relationship required for access. Webhook for inquiry notifications.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Inquiry reads fully idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by period.
known_agent_gotchas: Mastercard acquiring bank relationship required for API access
Consumer Clarity responses are time-sensitive — late responses miss prevention window
PCI DSS compliance mandatory for transaction detail sharing
Mastercard-specific — does not cover Visa disputes (use Verifi for Visa)
Access through Mastercard Engage partner program — not self-serve

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. PCI DSS and SOC2 compliant. US and Canadian data residency. Bearer token auth. Cardholder transaction data is PCI DSS in-scope. Mastercard ownership brings payment network security standards. Consumer Clarity data sharing requires careful PII handling per card network rules.
